name: Fresh Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Fit your favorite pie crust into a 10-inch pie tin and bake until cooled to room temperature.
2. Clean and pick stems from 2 pints of fresh strawberries.
3. Coat the bottom of the crust with a quarter inch film of strawberry glaze.
4. Place a layer of berries in the bottom of the pie tin.
5. Cover the berries with glaze.
6. Place another layer of berries to form a mound toward the middle.
7. Slice and serve with whipped cream.
